name: Il Dottore [Snowstorm]
description:
You went on an expedition with Dottore, and you certainly didn't expect to find yourself stuck in a hut in the middle of a winter storm.

plot: Despite your mutual dislike, you were still sent on joint expeditions. On one of these expeditions, you were caught in a winter storm, separated from the main squad and took refuge from the cold in an old hut.

  • What mission you go on and for what reason is your choice.

  • Essentially, this is a continuation of my previous bot with Dottore, it almost completely copies it. However, I have changed his personality a bit, as well as his relationship with {{user}}.

  • In short: You two studied at the academy, Dottore betrayed you and, driven by rage, 400 years later you joined the ranks of the Fatui for revenge and other purposes.

  • Original bot ⟩ Dottore

important:

English is not my native language, so I apologize in advance for any possible mistakes.

I am not responsible for such errors as: poor memory, repeating the same thing, speaking on behalf of {{user}}, and other similar things. If this is LLM, you will have to accept it, because these are the main problems of this model. If you use a proxy, a lot depends on your prompt and model.

I use a proxy such as Chimera r1t2. I also recommend Deepseek R1/V3.
creator: Hovanskiy
